day1_opening.name: Me
day1_opening.text: *Cherry blossoms scatter in the wind. A warm spring breeze slips through my uniform. Starting today, I'm a student at this school.*

day1_opening_2.name: Me
day1_opening_2.text: *Standing in front of the new school gate. A little nervous, but it's not a bad kind of excitement.*

day1_hallway_1.name: Me
day1_hallway_1.text: *The hallway is wide. Where's my classroom... I'm looking for a sign when--*

day1_sea_first.text: "Hey, you're the transfer student, right? I heard you were coming today."

day1_sea_first_2.name: Me
day1_sea_first_2.text: *I turn around and there's a girl standing there with a smile. Clean-cut look, class president armband.*

day1_sea_first_3.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_first_3.text: "Han Sea. I'm the class president. The homeroom teacher asked me to show you around. Nice to meet you, {name}."

day1_sea_first_4.name: Me
day1_sea_first_4.text: "Oh, nice to meet you too. Thanks for the help."

day1_sea_choco.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco.text: "Oh, here. Transferring to a new school is stressful, right? I always find that something sweet helps."

day1_sea_choco_2.name: Me
day1_sea_choco_2.text: *She hands me a chocolate milk. That's thoughtful.*

day1_sea_choco_choice.name: Me
choices: "That's sweet of you, but I'm more of a strawberry person."

day1_sea_choco_accept.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco_accept.text: "Glad you like it. I was hoping I'd pick the right one."

day1_sea_choco_question.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco_question.text: "Oh really? I'll bring strawberry next time then."

day1_sea_choco_question_2.name: Me
day1_sea_choco_question_2.text: *She answers with a smile. What a nice class president.*

day1_sea_choco_joke.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco_joke.text: "Strawberry? Oh, for real? I'll get strawberry next time. I'll remember that."

day1_classroom_enter.name: Me
day1_classroom_enter.text: *I follow Sea into the classroom. All eyes on me.*

day1_classroom_enter_2.name: Me
day1_classroom_enter_2.text: *I'm the transfer student, so of course they're staring. Maybe I should give a little wave.*

day1_classroom_enter_3.name: Me
day1_classroom_enter_3.text: *The vibe isn't bad. Everyone looks half curious, half welcoming.*

day1_eunsu_enter.name: Me
day1_eunsu_enter.text: *The classroom door opens and the homeroom teacher walks in.*

day1_eunsu_first.name: Park Eunsu
day1_eunsu_first.text: "Alright, everyone. We have a new transfer student joining us today."

day1_eunsu_first_2.name: Park Eunsu
day1_eunsu_first_2.text: "{name}, would you come up front and introduce yourself?"

day1_eunsu_first_3.name: Me
day1_eunsu_first_3.text: *I stand in front of the blackboard. A bit nervous, but it's not like this is my first time transferring.*

day1_eunsu_first_6.name: Park Eunsu
day1_eunsu_first_6.text: "Oh, I just mean I'd been waiting since I heard a transfer student was coming. So, go ahead and introduce yourself?"

day1_eunsu_first_7.name: Me
day1_eunsu_first_7.text: *I gave a quick introduction. Good reactions. That's a relief.*

day1_seat_guide.name: Park Eunsu
day1_seat_guide.text: "Your seat is over there, back row by the window. Make yourself comfortable."

day1_seolhwa_notice.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_notice.text: *I sit down. It's by the window, so the sunlight feels nice.*

day1_seolhwa_notice_2.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_notice_2.text: *...Someone's sitting in the seat behind me. Pale skin, eyes gazing off somewhere far away.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_choice.name: Me
choices: "Hey, I'm {name}. Looks like I'm sitting in front of you."

day1_seolhwa_greet_3.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_3.text: *No answer. I think our eyes met for a second, but she immediately looked away. Must be really shy.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_4.name: Boy Next Seat
day1_seolhwa_greet_4.text: "Yo, transfer kid. What are you looking at?"

day1_seolhwa_greet_5.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_5.text: "Nothing, I was just saying hi to the person behind me."

day1_seolhwa_greet_8.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_8.text: *I look behind me again. That girl is definitely there.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_9.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_9.text: *...Is he messing with me? Hazing the new kid? Yeah, that's probably it.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_10.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_10.text: *Let it go. It's the first day -- no need to start anything.*

day1_morning_end.name: Me
day1_morning_end.text: *Before long, the morning classes were over. Break time.*
